company_name: Douzone Bizon EQT cloud ERP case
notes: EQT deal is useful evidence for B2B SaaS/ERP quality, but ARR, churn, OPM, and FCF still gate Green.

company_name: Palantir Q4 2025 AI revenue and contract value
notes: AI is treated as structural only because revenue, contract value, government adoption, and commercial workflow evidence are present.

company_name: Palantir Q1 2026 fastest growth but 4B watch
notes: Strong revenue can still be 4B-watch when multiple expansion is saturated.

company_name: Akamai frontier model AI cloud infrastructure deal
notes: A long AI cloud contract can reframe a legacy CDN business, but margin, capex, customer concentration, and FCF must be checked.

company_name: Akamai AI cloud quarterly revenue contribution estimate
notes: Estimated quarterly revenue contribution improves Stage 2 evidence, but margin, capex, customer concentration, and FCF still gate promotion.

company_name: Datadog Q1 2026 AI observability
notes: Datadog is a Watch-to-Green candidate only if AI workload monitoring converts into ARR, retention, and FCF.

company_name: Dynatrace ARR and guidance risk after earnings beat
notes: Observability evidence can be real, but ARR/guidance weakness can still break the price path under premium valuation.

company_name: Fortinet Q1 2026 security billings
notes: Security software can be Watch-to-Green when billings, ARR, renewal, and operational trust are visible together.

company_name: Cisco AI infrastructure orders and restructuring watch
notes: AI networking orders support Stage 2 only when orders convert into software/security mix, revenue, margin, and FCF after restructuring costs.

company_name: Netflix ad tier 250m and privacy watch
notes: Netflix ad tier can be structural, but privacy/data litigation keeps RedTeam active.

company_name: The Trade Desk premium valuation revenue miss
notes: Ad-tech can be structural, but premium valuation makes revenue or guide misses a 4C watch.

company_name: CrowdStrike outage shareholder case
notes: Security ARR does not protect Stage 3 if operational trust breaks.

company_name: Kakao founder legal overhang and acquittal
notes: Platform moat is not enough while founder/M&A legal overhang pressures the valuation frame.

company_name: Roblox safety measures and forecast cut
notes: UGC game platforms cannot be scored on user scale alone when safety controls cut bookings.

company_name: Take-Two GTA VI preorder rumor
notes: Preorder rumors can move price, but they are not recurring IP portfolio evidence before bookings and launch quality are visible.

company_name: WPP global ad forecast cut
notes: Ad recovery is cyclical unless budget resilience and structural ad-tech economics are proven.

company_name: Netflix Texas privacy lawsuit
notes: Streaming ad growth remains RedTeam-constrained when privacy and dark-pattern allegations affect platform trust.

company_name: Meta scam ads lawsuit
notes: Ad revenue must pass a quality filter; scam-ad allegations are RedTeam evidence.

company_name: Meta youth safety trial
notes: Large-platform growth must be discounted when youth safety remedies can change product mechanics.

company_name: Legacy SaaS AI disruption versus reinforcement watch
notes: Legacy SaaS AI must prove reinforcement, not seat/license cannibalization.

company_name: Salesforce Agentforce ARR but mix and margin verification needed
notes: Agent ARR is useful Stage 2 evidence, but total mix, seat churn, gross margin, and workflow lock-in still gate promotion.
